title: project closing, automating off site archive
excerpt: Currently there is no way to automate excel exporting projects with updates, and downloading a zip files of the “file gallery” for local archival storage to be triggered when a project is marked completed. This can only …

posts.author: Gabe_j (Gabe Johnson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently there is no way to automate excel exporting projects with updates, and downloading a zip files of the “file gallery” for local archival storage to be triggered when a project is marked completed. This can only be done manually.

Could this be considered as an option instead or relegating all archival projects to the website cloud?
